commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Bear with the word of consolation, with what I have written to exhort and comfort you in a very few words, considering the importance of the subject, and the sublime mysteries. (Witham)

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Do you see that what he wrote to no one [else], he writes to them? For (he means) I do not even trouble you with long discourse.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
